# Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)

Jurisdiction: Canada
Region: CA
Citation: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
Authority: Justice Laws Website / OPC Canada
Source URL: https://laws-lois.justice.gc.ca/eng/acts/P-8.6/
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, retention_deletion, security_breach, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: PIPEDA, Canada, meaningful consent, personal information, OPC, breach records, 加拿大, 同意

## Summary
Canadian federal private-sector privacy law based on fair information principles, consent, access rights, safeguards, openness, accountability, and breach reporting duties.

## Key compliance obligations
- Obtain meaningful consent and identify purposes.
- Limit collection, use, disclosure, and retention.
- Provide access and correction rights.
- Report certain breaches and maintain breach records.
